backend/main.mo: Empty Motoko actor with no implemented logic.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping high-level features to involved files, components, and test IDs.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file providing human-written summaries for all existing frontend source files.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base/styles file defining global OKLCH color tokens, dark mode variables, and default border/background utilities.
frontend/index.html: Base HTML template with root mount point and script loading the React app.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Main React component assembling the full page layout with nav, all sections, and footer.
frontend/src/components/sections/AboutSe: About section with reveal-on-scroll animations and value cards for strategic, creative, and growth attributes.
frontend/src/components/sections/Contact: Contact section showing email, phone, Instagram links, and a CTA card with animated reveal.
frontend/src/components/sections/HeroSec: Hero section with logo, headline, CTAs, parallax background, and scroll indicator.
frontend/src/components/sections/Service: Services section rendering service cards with icons, descriptions, and animated reveal effects.
frontend/src/components/sections/Testimo: Renders a testimonials section with animated reveal and maps testimonial data into cards.
frontend/src/components/site/Footer.tsx: Displays the site footer with brand info, navigation links, contact details, and a dynamic copyright note.
frontend/src/components/site/SectionShel: Provides a layout wrapper for page sections with consistent padding and container styling.
frontend/src/components/site/ServiceIcon: Maps service IDs to corresponding Lucide icons and renders a styled icon wrapper.
frontend/src/components/site/TopNav.tsx: Implements a responsive top navigation bar with scroll behavior, mobile menu, and section scrolling.
frontend/src/content/contact.ts: Exports static contact details including email, phone, and Instagram URL.
frontend/src/content/services.ts: Defines an array of service objects containing IDs, titles, descriptions, taglines, and included items.
frontend/src/content/testimonials.ts: Contains an array of testimonial entries with client info and quotes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Creates and manages a backend actor based on Internet Identity, refreshing queries on identity change.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Manages Internet Identity authentication state, login flow, and identity persistence via context.
frontend/src/hooks/useInViewReveal.ts: Hook providing intersection‑based visibility detection with optional animation delay.
frontend/src/hooks/useParallax.ts: Hook calculating scroll‑based parallax offsets, respecting reduced‑motion preferences.
frontend/src/hooks/usePrefersReducedMoti: Provides a hook that tracks the user's reduced-motion preference using matchMedia and updates on changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Empty placeholder file exporting nothing for query-related hooks.
frontend/src/index.css: Sets up Tailwind layers, CSS variables for theming, dark mode styles, brand colors, utility classes, and reduced-motion CSS overrides.
frontend/src/lib/scrollToSection.ts: Smoothly scrolls to a DOM element by ID with an adjustable offset.
frontend/src/lib/utils.ts: Exports a utility function that merges class names using clsx and tailwind-merge.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Bootstraps the React app with React Query and Internet Identity providers and loads global styles.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Configures Tailwind with custom colors, typography, container queries, animations, and theme extensions.
project_state.json: Defines project state, features, branding, and image requirements for the One Dot Digital marketing website.
